summary.zh: Observatory 轨迹观察台工作台,把一次 agent 运行变得可见。它用 reactflow 把会话画成 session-root → 每一回合 turn → tool / 子 agent 的节点图,支持实时(SSE)跟随与离线回放;同时把拼好的 system prompt 切成可检视的模块切片并给出 token 估算,辅助上下文、skill、护栏与 cache 管理。它是被动消费宿主 observatory 端点的只读观测工具。
summary.en: The Observatory workbench makes a single agent run visible. Using reactflow it renders a session as a graph of session-root → each turn → tool / sub-agent nodes, with a live SSE tail and offline replay; it also slices the composed system prompt into inspectable modules with token estimates, aiding context / skill / guardrail / cache management. It is a read-only observer that passively consumes the host observatory endpoints.

body.zh:
reactflow 图:session → turn → tool / 子 agent
system-prompt 模块切片 + token 估算
body.en:
reactflow graph: session → turn → tool / sub-agent
system-prompt module slices + token estimates

body.zh: SSE 实时跟随 + 离线回放(只读)
面板管理启用 → 打开「wb-observatory」面板
body.en: Enable in Admin → open the 'wb-observatory' panel
